_spec: npc.memory_embedded (dim=1536) → INSERT npc_session_memory_embedding {npc_id, session_id, embedding, content_hash} (NpcSessionMemoryEmbeddingProjection, crates/projections/npc/src/lib.rs:200). Q-L3I-1 V1 dim LOCKED 1536. NOTE: the dim GATE reads payload.dim only — it does NOT check the embedding array length — so a short embedding here is fine as long as dim=1536 is declared; the arm copies the array verbatim. The mismatched-dim skip path is locked separately in npc.memory_embedded.skip.json.
